Description: Good luck completing... any of these ;)
Actual Requirements: Land the killing blow on the Ender Dragon OR leave the End through the exit portal OR obtain the "Remote Getaway" OR "Sky's the Limit" advancements

Description: Obtain all the blocks!
Actual Requirements: Obtain the blocks listed on this page: https://minecraft.wiki/w/Block#List_of_blocks

Description: Obtain all the items!
Actual Requirements: Obtain the items listed on this page: https://minecraft.wiki/w/Item#List_of_items

Description: Obtain a stack of all the blocks!
Actual Requirements: Obtain a stack of the blocks listed on this page: https://minecraft.wiki/w/Block#List_of_blocksThe following do not need to be obtained at maximum stack sizes: Dragon Egg, Netherite Block, Deepslate Emerald Ore, Heavy Core, Suspicious Sand, Suspicious Gravel, Tall Grass, Large Fern

Description: Obtain a stack of all the items!
Actual Requirements: Obtain a stack of the items listed on this page: https://minecraft.wiki/w/Item#List_of_itemsThe following do not need to be obtained at maximum stack sizes: Recovery Compass, Pottery Sherds. Only one kind of Smithing Template is required

Description: Look at every mob using a Spyglass, each from at least 25 blocks away
Actual Requirements: See requirement notes below

Description: Send every mob to the Nether... and kill them all there
Actual Requirements: See requirement notes below

Description: Send every mob to the End... and kill them all there
Actual Requirements: See requirement notes below

Description: Kill every mob in the game with splash potions
Actual Requirements: See requirement notes below

Description: Kill every mob in the game with lingering potions
Actual Requirements: See requirement notes below

Description: Strike every mob that can transform with lightning at once
Actual Requirements: Strike a Pig, Mooshroom, Villager and Creeper at the same time with the lightning bolt from a Channeling Trident

Description: Obtain a stack of Zombie Heads
Obtain a stack of Skeleton Skulls
Obtain a stack of Creeper Heads
Obtain a stack of Piglin Heads
Obtain a stack of Ender Dragon Heads

Advancement Name: Let's take it up a notch
Description: Collect 64 Enchanted Golden Apples
Collect 64 nether stars
Parent: Let's take it up a notch

Description: Obtain a stack of Beacons
Collect 64 Hearts of the Sea
Obtain a stack of Conduits
Construct a village in the End and defend it from a raid
Actual Requirements: You have to both start a raid in the End and finish a raid in the End to gain this advancement

Advancement Name: Dragon vs Dragon II: Electric Boogaloo
Description: Defeat the Ender Dragon while wearing a dragon head... without touching the ground
Actual Requirements: Once the Ender Dragon becomes attackable you must not be touching the ground AND be wearing a Dragon Head for the whole fight, and deal the killing blow. It also resets if you ride any vehicle OR touch water or lava
Notes: Known as "Dragon vs Dragon II: Electric Boogaloo" from introduction until 1.9, then renamed to "Dragon vs Dragon II", then changed back to "Dragon vs Dragon II: Electric Boogaloo" in 1.19 Alpha Build 1

Description: Defeat the Wither while wearing a Dragon head... without touching the ground
Parent: Dragon vs Dragon II: Electric Boogaloo
Actual Requirements: Once the Wither becomes attackable you must not be touching the ground AND be wearing a Dragon Head for the whole fight, and deal the killing blow. It also resets if you ride any vehicle OR touch water, lava or a climbable block such as ladders
Notes: Known as "Dragon vs Dragon: Pre-Sequel" (without the "The") until 1.19 Alpha Build 1

Advancement Name: At the Rim of the Sky
Description: Slay the Ender Dragon in one hit using a Mace
Actual Requirements: Deal over 200 hearts of damage to the Ender Dragon using a Mace (it does not have to have been on full health prior to the attack)

Description: Summon the Ender Dragon, the Wither, and a Raid within thirty seconds of each other, then defeat all of them without taking damage
Parent: At the Rim of the Sky

Description: See below for description and walkthrough (as it is very long)
Actual Requirements: The first is to smith a compass that vanishes
Notes: This was the 1000th advancement added to the datapack

Description: Open up every type of loot chest
Actual Requirements: Open the following loot chests when they have been unopened:

Description: Summon ten withers at once
Actual Requirements: At least ten withers must be in existence up to 128 blocks away from you (checked once every ten seconds)

Description: Have fifty Wardens present within 100 blocks of you
Fill your entire inventory with Totems of Undying
Actual Requirements: All inventory slots, including your hotbar and offhand, must be filled, hence requiring 37 totems of undying

Endermite, Evoker, Ghast, Guardian, Husk, Magma Cube, Phantom, Pillager, Ravager, Shulker, Silverfish, Skeleton, Slime, Stray, Vex, Vindicator, Witch, Wither Skeleton, 
Zombie Villager, Zombie, Llama, Trader Llama, Wolf, Dolphin, Iron Golem, Ender Dragon, Wither, Bee, Hoglin, Piglin, Zoglin, Piglin Brute, Goat, Warden, Breeze, Bogged, Creaking,
Nautilus, Zombie Nautilus, Parched
